case_title: FRENCH, TIMOTHY et al VS ALICE'S JEWELRY & ARTS INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRENCH, TIMOTHY ARAO, MARIETTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALICE'S JEWELRY & ARTS INC. $613.03 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $673.03, THE COURT ORDERS RESCISSION OF THE PURCHASE OF THE 18K WHITE GOLD MAN'S RING (SIZE 7 1/2). PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN THE DESCRIBE RING TO DEFENDANT'S BUSINESS AND IN EXCHANGE, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $613.03. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AS TO THE 14K LADY'S RING IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,101.28 FILED BY FRENCH, TIMOTHY ARAO, MARIETTA AS TO DEFENDANT ALICE'S JEWELRY & ARTS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALICE'S JEWELRY & ARTS INC.
